message:
fix(wamr): enable WASI for AOT and add native_registry stubs

- Add -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 to CMake build for both Darwin and Linux
  to ensure WASI native functions are compiled into libvmlib.a
- Add native_registry_init/count/register32 stubs to env module for AOT
  modules that import these functions (e.g., path_trace benchmark)

This fixes "failed to call unlinked import function" errors when running
AOT-compiled WASM modules that import WASI or native registry functions.

files.patch:
@@ -1249,11 +1249,13 @@ pub fn build(b: *std.Build) void {
         \\  mkdir -p build && cd build && \
         \\  if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then \
         \\    cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1 \
+        \\      -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 \
         \\      -DWAMR_BUILD_WITH_CUSTOM_LLVM=1 \
         \\      -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm@20 && \
         \\    make -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu); \
         \\  else \
         \\    cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1 \
+        \\      -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 \
         \\      -DWAMR_BUILD_WITH_CUSTOM_LLVM=1 \
         \\      -DLLVM_DIR=/usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/cmake/llvm && \
         \\    make -j$(nproc); \
